history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hoodie with a distressed white graphic print on the back stands in front of a bathroom mirror. The graphic on the hoodie reads "PEOPLE WHO WANT TO GET RID OF SADNESS" in a graffiti-like font, with two small circular eye symbols below it. The person is holding up a smartphone, taking a selfie in the mirror. The reflection shows the person's face partially obscured by the hoodie, and the same graphic on the back of the hoodie is visible.

The background is a bathroom with a modern aesthetic. A white rectangular sink with a chrome faucet is mounted on a dark wood countertop. Behind the sink is a large, arched mirror with a soft, diffused LED backlight that creates a halo effect. The walls are a light, neutral color, possibly beige or off-white, with some subtle texture. To the right of the mirror, a wooden shelf unit with a few items is visible.

The lighting is soft and ambient, primarily coming from the LED backlight of the mirror, which casts a gentle glow. There's also some overhead lighting, contributing to the overall bright but diffused atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by black from the hoodie and dark wood, contrasted with the white of the sink and the neutral tones of the walls and mirror. The mood is introspective and slightly melancholic, conveyed by the text on the hoodie and the act of taking a selfie in a private space. The style is contemporary and casual, with a touch of urban or streetwear influence due to the hoodie's design.
